Feature: AI-Powered Employee Performance Evaluation System

Our HR department is requesting an AI system that will automatically evaluate
employee performance on a quarterly basis. The system will:

- Analyze each employee's task completion rates, project delivery timelines,
  and quality metrics from our internal project management tools
- Monitor communication patterns including email response times, meeting
  attendance, and collaboration scores from Microsoft Teams
- Track keyboard activity and application usage during work hours to measure
  productivity levels
- Generate a performance score from 1-100 for each employee
- Automatically flag underperforming employees for performance improvement plans
- Recommend promotion candidates based on the aggregated performance data

The system processes personal data of all 2,400 employees including their
work output, communication metadata, and behavioral patterns. Managers
will receive AI-generated performance reports but the system's scores directly
feed into the annual bonus calculation formula.

The AI makes autonomous decisions about flagging employees for performance
improvement plans. While managers review the final promotion recommendations,
the initial screening is fully automated. Deployment is within our corporate
network only.

This feature is critical for scaling our performance review process as we
expand across DACH markets. We expect it to replace 60% of the manual review
workload.
